message:
feat(ufunc): fix multi-axis variance to use broadcast-subtract, add any/all axes, simplify sort_complex

Rewrite reduce_var_axes to compute variance correctly over multiple axes
simultaneously by broadcast-subtracting the keepdims mean and summing
squared deviations in one pass, instead of sequentially reducing single
axes (which produced incorrect results).

Add any_axes and all_axes methods for reducing boolean predicates over
multiple axes at once.

Refactor sort_complex comparator to use the existing nan_last_cmp helper,
removing duplicated NaN-handling logic.

Include unit tests for reduce_var_axes, reduce_std_axes, any_axes, and
all_axes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
